evals.prompt: Run /zoto-eval-execute with no flags in a repo where the LLM API key is not set.
evals.expected_output: Static pytest suite runs via pnpm run eval. No LLM cases are run. results.yml is written under evals/_runs/<ts>/. A drift line is appended after eval:update --check.
assertions: pnpm run eval was invoked (not eval:full)
No invocation of the LLM runner occurred
The results.yml contains a drift block with status in {clean, critical, unknown}

evals.prompt: Run /zoto-eval-execute --full --model opus-4.6 with CURSOR_API_KEY set in the environment.
evals.expected_output: Both static and LLM suites run. The LLM runner receives opus-4.6 both via --model and via ZOTO_EVAL_MODEL. results.yml records model: opus-4.6.
assertions: The LLM runner received --model opus-4.6 on the CLI
The ZOTO_EVAL_MODEL environment variable was set to opus-4.6 for the child process
A drift line is appended to results.yml after the run

evals.prompt: Run /zoto-eval-execute --full in a repo where CURSOR_API_KEY is missing.
evals.expected_output: The skill stops, uses askQuestion to offer either aborting or running static-only, and never invokes the LLM runner.
assertions: askQuestion was used to ask how to proceed
The LLM runner was not invoked
If the user chose static-only, pnpm run eval was invoked instead
